name: phone-at-agent-profile-side-channels-into-contact
description: Real-estate flow. User at WEB_COLLECT_AGENT_PROFILE types their phone instead of brokerage details. Bot must side-channel the phone into contactPhone AND stay at WEB_COLLECT_AGENT_PROFILE so the agent question gets re-asked. Earlier behavior: handler had no contact format short-circuit / no side-channel — phone got eaten by the LLM extractor (which returned no brokerage/years/designations) and the flow advanced with an empty agent profile, losing the phone.
